commit_scope: Release stale wellness attention tissue by making the Form engine sense report healthy symmetry without triggering the attention classifier, and correct active orientation docs for the current agent_status.py interface.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: Initial wellness showed Form engine covered 15/15 Python dispatch branches but still emitted the stale missing-arm guidance, causing what_wants_attention to include a healthy surface. The focused wellness rerun now shows 'symmetric — Form covers every Python dispatch branch', and what_wants_attention starts with the real static-to-dynamic wants. The active orientation files no longer reference the removed agent_status.py --diff flag; python3 scripts/agent_status.py --json works. Rebased cleanly through moving main heads; transient public 502s were observed during sibling Hostinger rollouts, while local process proof and PR guard remained green.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted yet from this branch; this is process/sensing tissue, not a runtime behavior change. Main-branch Hostinger rollouts were in progress during local proof.

phase_gate.notes: Focused proof, evidence validation, index check, diff check, rebase, local PR guard, and followthrough guard passed. Commit, push, PR, remote CI, merge, and final wellness/deploy alignment are still pending.

evidence_refs: scripts/wellness_check.py sense_form_engine now only emits missing-arm guidance when missing arms exist.
Focused wellness proof shows the Form engine healthy line moved out of what_wants_attention and into what_can_compost.
CLAUDE.md and docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md now name python3 scripts/agent_status.py / --json instead of the removed --diff flag.
python3 scripts/agent_status.py --json returned worktree/task data successfully.
